name: Firebase Firestore
description: Create, read, update, delete, and query documents in Firebase Firestore
author: awaitstep

projectId.label: Project ID
projectId.description: Firebase project ID. Used by: all actions.

collection.label: Collection
collection.description: Collection path. Used by: all actions.

documentId.label: Document ID
documentId.description: Document ID. Used by: Get Document, Update Document, Delete Document.

data.label: Data
data.description: Document data as key-value pairs. Used by: Create Document, Update Document.

queryField.label: Query Field
queryField.description: Field to query on. Used by: Query Collection.

queryOp.label: Query Operator
queryOp.description: Query operator. Used by: Query Collection.

queryValue.label: Query Value
queryValue.description: Value to compare. Used by: Query Collection.
